subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! His Holiness Zein hath lavished utmost praise upon thy faith, thy certitude and thy knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم حضرت زین نهایت ستایش از ایمان و ایقان و عرفان شما نموده اند
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
